word: G63 - ἀγραυλέω - agrauléō - ag-row-leh'-o - Abide in the field

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Abide in the field
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to live in the fields, be under the open sky, even by night
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G68 and G832 (in the sense of G833); to camp out: - abide in the field.
